question: There are 15 apples shared equally among 3 friends. How many apples does each friend get?
You have 20 stickers and want to put 4 stickers on each page. How many pages do you need?
hints: How many groups of 4 are in 20?

question: A teacher has 42 pencils to share equally among 7 students. How many pencils does each student get?
There are 56 chairs to arrange in rows of 8. How many rows will there be?
solution: 56 ÷ 8 = 7. There will be 7 rows of chairs.

question: A baker made 72 cookies. She puts 9 cookies in each box. How many boxes does she fill?
